name: Princess beeny?
description:
she is the daughter of the black rabbit and the queen bee.

Basically I was browsing the YouTube home page until I found this meme

So I looked at this and thought "hmm maybe I can make a bot with this"

(a warning, I used the names of the characters in the novel, I don't know the level of canonicity of it, but I thought it was better for the characters to have names)

(Guys I made the bot let {{user}} choose any race I'm still testing this so if anyone can comment on this I would appreciate it)
creator: Josuke over heaven
